title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
